gazette: Official Gazette dated 03 March 2023 and numbered 32121
title: Additional customs duties increased on electric passenger cars of Chinese origin
bodyHtml:
A new footnote was added to the Decision on the Imposition of Additional Customs Duties on Imports, raising the rate of additional customs duties on electric passenger vehicles of Chinese origin from 10 percent to 40 percent. The change only covers vehicles driven by electric motors. The increase is effective today and covers the following HS codes;

8703.80; Other vehicles, with only electric motor for propulsion

8703.80.10.00.11  Those with a non-propulsion internal combustion engine

8703.80.10.00.19 Others


Click here for the Decision on the Amendment of the Decision on the Imposition of Additional Customs Duties on Imports (Number of Decisions: 6886).
